\"\")[:200])\n\n# Fetch full conversation\nconversation = get(f\"/v1/conversation?sessionId={session_id}\")\nrecommendations = get(f\"/v1/recommendations?sessionId={session_id}\")\n\nprint(\"Total conversation.get(\"messages\", []):\n    role = msg.get(\"role\", \"\")\n    content = msg.get(\"content\", \"\")\n    messages.append({\"role\": role, \"content\": content})\n\ntranscript = {\n    \"sessionId\": session_id,\n    \"domain\": \"movie\",\n    \"messages\": messages,\n    \"turns\": conversation.get(\"turns\", [])\n}\n\n# Build recommendation result — count turns to first recommendation\nturns_to_rec = 0\nrecommended_items = recommendations.get(\"recommendedItems\", [])\nfor i, turn in enumerate(conversation.get(\"turns\", []), 1):\n    if
